readme_policy: do not edit README during campaign; full rewrite pending; track suite_tests here

batch_19_36_new_papers.description: Newly-added text-to-CAD papers 19-36 (find -newermt '-4 days', sorted, sed 19,36p). Read FULLY; deterministic buildables implemented where not already covered by existing modules.

built_this_session.feature: 40 inventive principles + 39 engineering parameters + seeded contradiction-matrix lookup + Stage-2 prompt scaffold (deterministic, no model call)
triangular soft-target label-smoothing distribution w~=(beta-|k-t|)/Z over [t-delta,t+delta], beta=2,delta=3, + soft cross-entropy (Eqs 6-7)
6-way canonical extrusion-direction classification (D.3) + consecutive-equivalent sketch-extrude component collapse, origin-invariant, threshold=3 (D.1)
Compiler-as-a-Judge binary labelling rule: desirable iff compiled AND CD<=threshold; batch labels + invalidity ratio (the decision rule missing from binary_preferences.py)

already_covered_no_dup.existing: binary_preferences.py (CJM record), kto.py (prospect-theory objective); added only the missing CD-threshold decision rule
eval/bench/geometry/mesh_discrepancy.py (sphericity, Sphericity Discrepancy, Euler characteristic, Exact Euler Characteristic Match, median CD)
solid_iou.py/voxel_iou.py + selftrain reward stack (IoU+invalid reward, hard-example mining already in dataengine)
agents/generation/kernel_metrics.py, difficulty_tiers.py, api_reference.py, error_patterns.py (kernel bbox/volume/face-count checks, T1-T3 tiers, RAG-KB scaffolds)
domain/geometry/parametric/bezier.py, nurbs_surface.py, tessellation.py (Bezier/NURBS patch eval + differentiable-style tessellation)
agents/agent/tool_schema.py + tool_metrics.py + tool_reward.py (typed skill library, solver-aligned trajectory metrics, format/policy/exec reward)
data/dataengine/reward/visual_score.py (multi-aspect visual composite), eval/bench/vision/silhouette_iou.py, protocols/parameter_dimension_scoring.py, benchmark_taxonomy.py
eval/bench/protocols/benchmark_taxonomy.py + drawing_analysis_rubric.py + manufacturing_feature_recognition.py + defect_confusion.py (8-task VLM engineering-design taxonomy)

skipped_no_deterministic_component.why: Purely text-to-image (Stable Diffusion) CAD-image prompting + human Likert feasibility/novelty study; the feasibility-novelty tradeoff is an empirical finding with no deterministic algorithm to build.
Open-source framework for agentic hardware/software (RTL) co-design on Ray; out of scope for mechanical text-to-CAD and explicitly nondeterministic agent orchestration.

skipped_no_deterministic_component.paper: Further results on Minimal and Minimum Cylindrical Algebraic Decompositions (#36)
skipped_no_deterministic_component.why: 'CAD' here = Cylindrical Algebraic Decomposition (symbolic real algebraic geometry). Acronym collision, not computer-aided design; no text-to-CAD component.

batch_19_36_new_papers.most_valuable_feature: TRIZ contradiction matrix scaffold (triz_matrix.py) -- the only entirely-uncovered deterministic capability in the batch: canonical 40 principles + 39 parameters + matrix lookup + Stage-2 prompt scaffold, enabling deterministic creative-alternative ideation with zero model calls.
batch_19_36_new_papers.tests: 37 new unit tests across 4 modules, all passing (python -m pytest, 37 passed).

batch_new_papers_1_18.description: Newly-added text-to-CAD papers 1-18 (find -newermt '-6 days', sorted, sed 1,18p) -- the LOWER HALF. Read fully via extracted text; deterministic buildables implemented where not already covered by existing modules.

built_this_session.feature: tiny-loop/hole classification by perimeter ratio (Step-II, |L|>2 & L/Lmax<tau_h), proximity-aware multi-scale SPH poly6 soft-label membership with normalised argmax (Sec 3.2), and sketch-artist skill-amplitude schedule alpha(kappa)=(6-kappa)/5 (Sec 3.3)
six-layer engineering-semantic completeness checklist + three-tier level assignment (solid_modeling / feature_modeling / industrial_parametric) + DeepCAD-vs-WHUCAD ranking

CAD-IR procedural rep: produces/consumes entity dependency DAG, structural validation (unique names, no double-produce, resolved deps), Kahn topological order (stable, cycle-detecting), parameterized skill instantiation

constrained multi-objective design eval: per-design feasibility (g<=tol), population feasibility-rate + mean constraint-satisfaction + per-constraint rates, min-max-normalised weighted objective aggregation over feasible designs
curriculum synthetic->real domain-mixing schedule: linear warmup real_fraction, integer batch composition (label-efficient ~1.5% real), materialised schedule table with cumulative sample totals

counting eval protocol: MAE/RMSE (FSC-147), numerically-conditioned quantity bins (few/several/many), multi-level quantity-alignment consistency score combining exact relative-count accuracy + bin-level agreement
dual discrete vocabularies (6 surface types / 5 curve types) + one-hot+log-scaled descriptor face/edge tokens + fixed-length mean-pooled global BRep descriptor + cosine CAD-aware similarity metric
text-driven edit evaluation: identity_preservation (out-of-region entities preserved), edit_locality (changes confined to intended region), blended identity score + added/removed/modified id sets
GRPO group-relative advantage A_i=(r_i-mean)/(std+eps) (zero for degenerate/singleton groups) + CAD reward composition 1/(1+CD) geometric x binary format reward (non-executing => 0)

FeatureScript 15-op vocabulary + makeQuery-style validation allowing any op to reference entities produced by ANY earlier op (role must be produced by target op), boolean-kind and pattern-count constraints -- lifting the flat sketch-extrude-only limitation

already_covered_no_dup.paper: Advanced Knowledge Extraction of Physical Design Drawings (#2)
already_covered_no_dup.existing: domain/drawings/hough_primitives.py (explicitly mined from this paper: deterministic Hough line/circle detection)
domain/fabrication/overhang.py (45deg overhang detection, orientation search, stability descriptors -- mined from this paper)
eval/quality/sequence/design_state.py (design-state 5-tuple z=(F,Phi,C,H,A) + editability score, mined from this paper)
domain/geometry/assembly/mates.py (typed ports/mates closed-form transforms) + mobility.py (connectivity/mate-aware clash), mined from this paper

already_covered_no_dup.paper: Automated CAD Modeling Sequence Generation / TCADGen+CADLLM (#10)
already_covered_no_dup.existing: eval/quality/sequence/confidence.py (dual-channel type+argument confidence, selective-correction refinement context)
domain/reconstruction/brep/voronoi_half_patch.py (Voronoi Half-Patch representation, mined from this paper)

batch_37_71_new_papers.description: Newly-added text-to-CAD papers 37-71 (find -newermt '-6 days', sorted, sed 37,$p) -- the UPPER HALF. Read fully via pdftotext-extracted text; deterministic buildables implemented where not already covered by existing modules. Completed after prior agents hit a session limit at paper 36.

built_this_session.feature: azimuth/depression viewing-projection + closed-form 2D principal-axis pose skeleton + deterministic DBSCAN scattering-center localisation (the GECM derivation)
6-command/16-parameter construction-sequence grammar + deterministic per-command Command-Line and text-prompt template rendering (Sec 3.1-3.2)
construction-tree T={P,F,L} disentanglement + object-level op trajectory + part-level topology sequence + structure-preserving parameter perturbation (ranking negatives)
Constraint-Aware Editability metrics ER, cPCSR (conditional on reachability), OES=ER*cPCSR + 19 constraint types
embodied-carbon CO2e material accounting: intensity lookup + bill-of-materials aggregation + top-N contributor ranking (the insight post-processing module)
Chamfer-Distance Tolerance-Recall (CD-TR) curve + normalised AUC-TR, survivor-bias-free (non-executing attempts count as failures at every tolerance)
hierarchical decomposition graph + layered structured-text serialise/parse round-trip + node/hierarchy accuracy + Geometric Constraint Satisfaction (GCS)
dual-track (case/skill) memory + utility-reranked retrieval (alpha*sim+beta*utility) with online value-update feedback, avoiding semantically-similar-but-infeasible retrieval traps
CAD edit-operation taxonomy + alias folding + set-level edit-operation F-score (feature-based, no geometry) + 4 modality-combination enumeration
NURBS-surface JSON schema validator (poles grid, knots/mults, degrees, weights, periodic) enforcing the OCCT Geom_BSplineSurface consistency contract
two-stage retrieval cascade: CLIP text-filter (max-over-views, threshold) then DINOv2 visual-refine argmax over survivors
load-case representation + safety-factor-in-band [2.0,5.0] graded functional validity + volume-minimising design objective
quantitative edit-instruction parser (reduce/increase/set + magnitude/unit, to-vs-by) + progressive-refinement session applying exact parameter deltas
LDraw type-1 line parser/validator + three buildability metrics (drawing accuracy, structural validity vs vocabulary, instructional coherence)
typed engineering-requirement checker (6 FEA categories) + mean-requirement-pass partial credit + strict-pass + per-category scorecard
progressive assembly trace from a part hierarchy (stable topo build order) + cumulative states + component-numeracy + trace-faithfulness (T2S-CompBench)
parametric gable-roof generation from a fixed footprint + structural-consistency metrics (footprint violation, opening preservation)
unified multi-task scorecard (5 tasks, orientation-aware normalisation) + mean unified score + CAD-QA exact-match accuracy
operation-vocabulary coverage + normalised-Shannon operation diversity + beyond-sketch-extrude richness + named-parameter readability (dataset Table-1 criteria)

already_covered_no_dup.existing: agents/agent/pair_programming.py (Driver/Navigator loop, role switching, best-verified fallback)
io/formats/step_graph.py + step_reserialize.py + step_schema.py (DFS reserialisation + STEP graph validity)
